beats.text: Imu just clapped Gear 5 — not fought, not survived. Clapped.
Luffy says the thing 800 chapters were building to: I'm Joyboy.
Imu doesn't flinch. "Joyboy is long dead."
The crew doesn't even know who they're looking at — best guess is Commander of the Knights of God.
Gear 5 meets a halo of eyes with: "are those supposed to be bombs?!"
Mid-fight, Luffy spots Loki alive. Loki: "I'm still alive, you moron!!"
That distraction is the opening. Caught-You-Slipping Bullet.
Jet Gatling, full send. Imu takes it like a man checking his watch.
The genie comes out of the smoke. Still not enough.
He names the blade. Vohu — the Blade of Nothingness.
Luffy run through: "Joyboy... was not this weak."
Was not. Past tense. Imu fought the first Joyboy personally.
Every Joyboy clue, chapter-gated, on the iceberg.
